items.b: Consequential Amendments Regulations in force; commencement Nos 3 and 4 stage in the environmental delivery plans, nature restoration levy, CPO reforms and NSIP changes through 2026. Verify each provision before relying on it.
Authorities whose adopted housing requirement is 80% or less of local housing need must add a 20% buffer (NPPF December 2024 transitional arrangements).
A fully restructured draft was consulted December 2025 – March 2026. The December 2024 Framework remains in force until the revised version is published — watch this space.
